parameters.name: Data Output Format
parameters.description: Specify the desired format for your output data. You can use "CSV", "JSON" or "AVRO" with this ReadyFlow.

parameters.name: CDP Workload User Password
parameters.description: Specify the password of the Cloudera machine user or workload user you are using to authenticate against Kafka.

parameters.name: Schema Registry Hostname
parameters.description: Specify the hostname of the Schema Registry you want to connect to. This must be the direct hostname of the Schema Registry itself, not the Knox Endpoint.

parameters.name: CDP Workload User
parameters.description: Specify the Cloudera machine user or workload user name that you want to use to authenticate to Kafka. Ensure this user has the appropriate access rights to the source and destination Kafka topics.

parameters.name: Kafka Producer ID
parameters.description: Specify the id for the Kafka producer writing into the destination topic.

parameters.name: Filter Rule
parameters.description: Specify the filter rule expressed in SQL to filter streaming events for the destination topic. Records matching the filter will be written to the destination topic. The default value forwards all records.

parameters.name: CSV Delimiter
parameters.description: If your source data is CSV, specify the delimiter here.

parameters.name: Data Input Format
parameters.description: Specify the format of your input data. You can use "CSV", "JSON" or "AVRO" with this ReadyFlow.

parameters.name: Kafka Broker Endpoint
parameters.description: Specify the Kafka bootstrap servers string as a comma separated list.

parameters.name: Schema Name
parameters.description: Specify the schema name to be looked up in the Schema Registry.
